privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated WordPress WXR export file created dynamically in setup_task.sh. The expected user (cloudnova_archive), email, role, and category are explicitly mandated by the task instructions. The target post titles ('Welcome to CloudNova', 'Draft: Internal Q3 Strategy') exactly match the XML elements generated in the setup script.
